item.title: Don't Learn OpenClaw—It Won't Last the Year
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: OpenClaw is a great idea, but it won’t be a great solution. High costs, security risks, big tech competition, and a lack of user education—these four obstacles combined make it difficult to sustain a long-term prosperous ecosystem.
